name: media.ccc.de
description: media.ccc.de is the video portal of the Chaos Computer Club. Browse and search 15,000+ recordings from CCC congresses, camps, and community events.
author: OnlinePersona & PixelMelt

2: Video recommendations (shuffled talks from the same conference)
Subtitles (VTT) with auto-generated indicator and language labels
Audio-only sources (MP3, Opus) with human-readable language names, translation tagging, and bitrate display
Home feed pagination into full event archive
Rich descriptions with speakers, tags, language, and event links
Proper frontend URLs for author/channel links
Bitrate estimation from file size metadata
3: Bulk-prefetch conference logos to reduce home page load from ~47 HTTP requests to 2
Fix speaker search URLs to use correct /search?p= endpoint

settings.name: Preferred Language
settings.description: Filter video/audio sources to show only recordings in this language. 'All Languages' shows every available recording.
